好感院人","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4NuSId5GnTB2MEsKlEvpgv/+IKz/LGDjvrpjjTGcpD9","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/dac29409dee04d9880b637ac3cee32e1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703429&x-signature=YRu9RsavJ%2B8Q%2Bw9jTDbeSgL0B3s%3D","user_id":"2322640720102638","user_name":"晨怡殊影"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2322640720102638","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1663513303,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7326792841806498878","book_info":{"abstract":"【无女主+无cp】
（我本来选的是女频，平台给我分的男频，如果不喜欢，点掉就好）
（这不是传统修仙，不是传统修仙）

——假如你能看见你人生的选项，你会怎么选？
陆榆：我选择摆烂

可惜摆烂途中总会出现各种障碍。
炮灰甲：听说你是师叔祖新收的徒弟，跟我比一场，我倒要看看你有什么能耐！
······
炮灰甲落荒而逃：不愧是小师叔！
因为懒得动，一招秒了人的陆榆：？

炮灰乙：听说小师叔一月筑基，三年结丹，不愧是修真界新一代最强！
只是躺着灵气就自发运转，突然结丹的陆榆：？
······
最后，摆着摆着，摆成了修真界最强的陆榆：？？？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o23853c7c6e5d3f55abeb349d49434cc6~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"骆成吉","author_id":"","book_id":"7326792841806498878","book_name":"摆烂从能看见选项开始","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c8c8c8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5270人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":248,"name":"玄幻言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=248&name=玄幻言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7326792844922864190","read_count":"5270","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"415037"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.2","serial_count":"271","tags":"玄幻言情,古代言情,无CP","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o23853c7c6e5d3f55abeb349d49434cc6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779320195&x-signature=WLiAtt4iR%2BM6Skyj3gB3TDA8z70%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1297886441904039","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"50"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322073635E84D6C249D48366E0009"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":88,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":10569,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":19812,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":16357},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1708354438,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7344722523384349465","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":
